Items.Item: Rarity: RARE Damnation Clutches Warlock Gloves Energy Shield: 320 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.9887 Unique ID: 9962e8142c07d71ddf9fd3be0a0c539929f3ce20625ce425238c8fe7880858a8 Item Level: 88 Quality: 29 Sockets: W-W-B-W LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 0.4% of Physical Damage Leeched as Life +20% to Physical Damage over Time Multiplier {fractured}18% increased Effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills on Enemies Socketed Gems have 16% more Attack and Cast Speed +47 to maximum Energy Shield 91% increased Energy Shield +128 to maximum Life +47% to Lightning Resistance

Rarity: UNIQUE The Dark Monarch Lich's Circlet Energy Shield: 246 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.0588 Unique ID: f51960489421daf9e37cf72bb08625f8baa9a5f06c966e8b4801b418218cd5b5 Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-B LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 Socketed Skill Gems get a 90% Cost & Reservation Multiplier 5% increased maximum Energy Shield +87 to maximum Energy Shield +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems +29% to Chaos Resistance 50% reduced Light Radius Maximum number of Summoned Golems is Doubled Cannot have Minions other than Summoned Golems Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE The Primordial Chain Coral Amulet Unique ID: 4dd514854e33bb1e38c4344e84d6f54f636d2f1187c6d7ae9b33b6e00d8c6a91 Item Level: 86 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates As The Mountain +1% to all maximum Resistances +3 to maximum number of Summoned Golems You cannot have non-Golem Minions 25% reduced Golem Size Golems Deal 28% less Damage Golems have 26% less Life Golems have 95% increased Movement Speed Primordial Corrupted
